# Ultima IV dungeon: shame
# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — 8 levels of 8x8 (nibble-coded), then the room-data block.
# format: ascii-dungeon v1  size=8 levels=8
# legend (char  hex  kind):
#   ~  00  corridor
#   !  10  ladder_up
#   $  20  ladder_down
#   %  30  ladder_both
#   &  40  chest
#   '  70  fountain
#   (  91  room_1
#   )  92  room_2
#   *  a1  altar_1
#   +  b0  door_special
#   ,  c0  kind_c
#   -  d0  door
#   .  d1  door_1
#   /  d2  door_2
#   0  d3  door_3
#   1  d4  door_4
#   2  d5  door_5
#   3  d6  door_6
#   4  d7  door_7
#   5  d8  door_8
#   6  d9  door_9
#   7  da  door_a
#   8  db  door_b
#   9  dc  door_c
#   :  dd  door_d
#   ;  de  door_e
#   <  df  door_f
#   =  e0  room_marker
#   F  f0  wall
#
== level 0 ==
|FFFFF~FF|
|F%F$F~F~|
|FFFFF3F~|
|,~F~~45~|
|F~F~FFFF|
|~~F$~~~~|
|F~FFFFFF|
|F~~)F~~'|
== level 1 ==
|FFFFF~FF|
|F%F%F~~~|
|FFFFFFF~|
|F$~~~~F~|
|F~F*F~F~|
|F~*!*~F~|
|F~F*F~F~|
|F~~~~~F+|
== level 2 ==
|FFFFFFF~|
|F%F%F~~~|
|FFFFF~FF|
|F!~2~~~~|
|FFF~FFF~|
|F~~~~~F~|
|F~F~F~FF|
|F,F$F,F~|
== level 3 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|F%F%=~F(|
|FFFFF-F'|
|'(F~./0~|
|FFF~F1FF|
|~~~~F~F$|
|FFFFF~FF|
|~~~!F~~~|
== level 4 ==
|FFFFF~FF|
|F%F%F~~F|
|FFFFFF~F|
|F$~~~F~~|
|FFFF~FF,|
|,~~F~~,!|
|FF~FFFF,|
|~F~$F~F~|
== level 5 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|F%F%F&&&|
|FFFFF&F&|
|F!F&&&&&|
|F~F&F&F&|
|F~=6&&&&|
|F~FFF&F&|
|F$~!F&&&|
== level 6 ==
|FFFFFF~F|
|F!7!F~~F|
|FFFFF~FF|
|~~~~~~8F|
|FFFFFFFF|
|~~~~~~~F|
|FF,,FF~F|
|F!~~$F~F|
== level 7 ==
|FFFFFF~F|
|F<~~~~~F|
|FFFFFF~F|
|~~~~~~9F|
|~FFFFF:F|
|~~F''(;F|
|F~FFFFFF|
|F~~~!F~<|
# crc32: 0923e343
